calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-21-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Leilan Kiin.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 2:01:55 p.m. and concluding at 2:13:18 p.m.

Kristen Dean Esq. appearing on behalf of Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by Defendant Leilan Kiin.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. gives case summary and makes offer of proof.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: Declaration of Plaintiff in lieu of personal testimony

Plaintiff's Exhibit A is ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bank of America N.A., and against Defendant Leilan Kiin.

Plaintiff Bank of America N.A, is awarded judgment against Defendant Leilan Kiin as follows:
Damages/Principal: $11,600.06
Costs: $513.51
Total Judgment: $12,113.57

Proposed Judgment was submitted, signed, and served in open Court. (D505)
